queries.query: Prepare a reusable assignment for another coding agent.
Create version 1 of a cross-agent dependency audit task.
Revise the published migration assignment as its next immutable version.
Run .agents/tasks/api-audit-v2.md with TARGET="src/api".
Package this request so I can transfer it to another model.
Validate and publish a bounded agent task without executing it.
Execute the existing versioned task and keep its definition unchanged.
Author a capability-constrained assignment for a later conversation.
Plan how you would refactor this function in our current chat.
Write a TODO list for today's work.
Save the unfinished implementation state for tomorrow.
Delegate two independent code reviews now.
Create a GitHub issue description.
Explain the task template without creating a task.
Implement this small feature directly.
Review the current diff without making changes.
Revise the published dependency-audit assignment as version 2 for another agent.
Create a capability-gated cross-agent task file, validate it, and do not run it.
Write a checklist for my own use in this conversation.
Plan today's edits without creating a reusable assignment contract.
